summary: Successfully completed frontend testing of authentication pages after Google OAuth removal. All required features are working correctly with email/password authentication and multi-step signup flow.
passed_tests: Login page loads without Google OAuth button (properly commented out)
Login form has email and password fields with correct placeholders
Sign in button is visible and functional
Signup page loads without Google OAuth button (properly commented out)
Signup has multi-step email verification flow (email -> OTP -> password)
Navigation link between login and signup pages works correctly
Email field accepts input correctly on both pages
Password field functions properly on login page
OTP verification step displays correctly with proper UI indicators
Step indicators show proper progression during signup flow
Resend code and back navigation options available in signup flow
All form elements are properly styled and responsive
SVG icons are appropriate (arrow icons, not Google OAuth)
test_report_links: Screenshots captured: login_form.png, signup_step1.png, signup_step2.png, navigation_test_final.png
